name: academorix/analytics
purpose: Product analytics substrate — AnalyticsEvent ledger, AnalyticsIdentity resolution, per-provider AnalyticsDelivery log, and per-tenant AnalyticsProviderConfig.
capabilities: Retention window enforcement per subscription tier
when_to_use: Recording product-usage events and fanning them out to the tenant's configured analytics providers.
when_not_to_use: For marketing attribution + touchpoint chains, use the sibling academorix/attribution package.
